title: Ath Largest Element
hints: Use a min heap to maintain the A largest elements seen so far.
For each element in the array, add it to the heap.
If the heap size exceeds A, remove the smallest element (root of min heap).
The root of the min heap (smallest among the A largest) is the Ath largest element.
If the heap size is less than A, output -1 for that index.
The min heap will always contain the A largest elements, with the smallest of them at the root.
